suggestions.text: Explore this codebase and summarise the architecture
Find all TODOs and help me prioritise them
Review recent git changes and summarise what happened
Write tests for the most critical untested code
Refactor the messiest file in this project
Help me set up a CI/CD pipeline
Create a script to automate a repetitive task
Research best practices for this tech stack
Help me debug an issue I'm stuck on
Build a new feature from scratch
Generate documentation for the public API
Audit this project for security vulnerabilities
Optimise the slowest parts of the codebase
Help me plan the next sprint of work
Create a presentation about this project
